g.text: Ontology Diagram Editor - Core Event Sequence
The event bus is the boundary between event emission and event use.
Components publish domain events with payloads; subscribers update their
own state without inspecting another component's DOM or private state.
Preview events never write the file.
Only completed, valid gestures become one logical document edit.
Solid arrows emit events or apply state changes.
Dashed arrows consume events and update local UI state.
